name: sidecar-ai
description: Autonomous AI agent for coding — run full agent loops with local Ollama, Anthropic Claude, or OpenAI models

sidecar.baseUrl.description: API base URL (Ollama default: http://localhost:11434, Anthropic: https://api.anthropic.com)

sidecar.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key (ignored for local Ollama, required for Anthropic). **Stored in VS Code SecretStorage** — use the `SideCar: Set API Key (SecretStorage)` command to set securely. Plaintext values here are migrated to SecretStorage on activation.

sidecar.model.description: Model to use for chat (e.g. qwen3-coder, qwen3.5, claude-sonnet-4-6)

sidecar.filePatterns.description: File patterns to include when building workspace context

sidecar.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to include in workspace context

sidecar.contextLimit.description: Override the context token limit for local models (0 = auto-detect with 16K default cap). Increase if you have enough VRAM and want longer conversations.

sidecar.customTools.description: Custom tools that run shell commands. Format: [{ "name": "...", "description": "...", "command": "..." }]

sidecar.customModes.description: Custom agent modes with dedicated system prompts and approval behavior. Example: [{ "name": "architect", "description": "Design-only mode", "systemPrompt": "Focus on architecture...", "approvalBehavior": "manual" }]

description.description: Short description shown in the mode dropdown

systemPrompt.description: Additional system prompt text injected when this mode is active

approvalBehavior.description: Tool approval behavior for this mode

toolPermissions.description: Per-tool permission overrides for this mode

sidecar.hooks.description: Pre/post-execution hooks by tool name. Keys are tool names or '*' for all. Value: { "pre": "command", "post": "command" }

sidecar.scheduledTasks.description: Recurring tasks to run on interval

sidecar.mcpServers.markdownDescription:
MCP servers to connect to. Supports stdio, HTTP, and SSE transports. Also reads `.mcp.json` at workspace root.

**stdio:** `{ "command": "npx", "args": ["server"] }`

**HTTP:** `{ "type": "http", "url": "https://...", "headers": {} }`

**Options:** `tools` (per-tool enable/disable), `maxResultChars` (output limit, default 50000)

sidecar.agentMode.description: Agent mode: cautious, autonomous, manual, plan, or a custom mode name from sidecar.customModes

sidecar.agentTemperature.description: Temperature for agent tool-calling requests. Lower values (0.1-0.3) produce more deterministic tool selection. Set higher (0.7-1.0) for creative tasks.

sidecar.agentMaxIterations.description: Maximum agent loop iterations before stopping

sidecar.agentMaxMessages.description: Maximum conversation messages before agent should wrap up (ceiling). Agent must complete full cycle if possible.

sidecar.agentMaxTokens.description: Maximum total tokens before stopping the agent loop

sidecar.requestTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for each LLM request. If no tokens arrive within this time the request is aborted. Set to 0 to disable.

sidecar.shellTimeout.description: Default timeout for shell commands in seconds

sidecar.shellMaxOutputMB.description: Maximum shell output size in MB before truncation

sidecar.bgMaxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of background agents that can run simultaneously

sidecar.includeActiveFile.description: Include the currently active file in chat context

sidecar.completionModel.description: Model for inline completions (leave empty to use the chat model)

sidecar.completionMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for inline completion responses

sidecar.completionDebounceMs.description: Minimum interval in milliseconds between completion requests

sidecar.verboseMode.description: Show detailed agent reasoning — iteration summaries, tool selection context, and system prompt assembly

sidecar.expandThinking.description: Show model reasoning blocks expanded by default instead of collapsed

sidecar.chatDensity.description: Chat UI density — compact shrinks message padding and gaps, comfortable expands them

sidecar.chatFontSize.description: Chat UI base font size in pixels

sidecar.chatAccentColor.description: Override the chat accent color used for user messages and step indicators (any valid CSS color). Leave empty to inherit from the active VS Code theme.

sidecar.terminalErrorInterception.description: Detect non-zero exit codes in the integrated terminal and offer to diagnose the failure in the SideCar chat. Requires VS Code shell integration.

sidecar.pinnedContext.description: Files or folders always included in context (relative paths). Use @pin:path in chat to add dynamically.

sidecar.autoFixOnFailure.description: Automatically check for errors after agent edits and feed them back to the model for self-correction

sidecar.provider.description: LLM provider backend. 'auto' detects from the base URL (localhost:11434 → Ollama, anthropic.com → Anthropic, localhost:11435 → Kickstand, anything else → OpenAI-compatible). Set explicitly for LM Studio, vLLM, llama.cpp, OpenRouter, or Kickstand.

sidecar.fetchUrlContext.description: Automatically fetch web page content when URLs are pasted in chat

sidecar.fallbackBaseUrl.description: Fallback API URL. If the primary backend fails repeatedly, SideCar switches to this. Leave empty to disable fallback.

sidecar.fallbackApiKey.markdownDescription: API key for the fallback backend. **Stored in VS Code SecretStorage** — plaintext values are migrated on activation.

sidecar.fallbackModel.description: Model to use on the fallback backend

sidecar.dailyBudget.description: Daily spending budget in USD. Agent runs are blocked when the limit is reached. Set to 0 to disable.

sidecar.weeklyBudget.description: Weekly spending budget in USD. Agent runs are blocked when the limit is reached. Set to 0 to disable.

commands.title: SideCar: Scan Staged Files for Secrets

scripts.copy-grammars: mkdir -p grammars && cp node_modules/web-tree-sitter/tree-sitter.wasm grammars/ && cp node_modules/tree-sitter-wasms/out/tree-sitter-typescript.wasm node_modules/tree-sitter-wasms/out/tree-sitter-tsx.wasm node_modules/tree-sitter-wasms/out/tree-sitter-javascript.wasm node_modules/tree-sitter-wasms/out/tree-sitter-python.wasm node_modules/tree-sitter-wasms/out/tree-sitter-rust.wasm node_modules/tree-sitter-wasms/out/tree-sitter-go.wasm grammars/
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run bundle && npm run copy-grammars
scripts.check: npm run compile && npm run lint && npm run test
